/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pthread -shared -Wl,-soname,libresource_retriever.so -o /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/resource_retriever/lib/libresource_retriever.so CMakeFiles/resource_retriever.dir/src/retriever.cpp.o   -L/opt/ros/melodic/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/melodic/lib: -lcurl /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx -lboost_regex /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroslib.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librospack.so -lpython2.7 -lboost_filesystem -lboost_program_options -lboost_system -ltinyxml2
